response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r2c2 is 0.10 below your 0.2 threshold and coordinated round-robin is active with critical SoC across 6+ peers; contributing 0.5 kWh via dr_aggregator prevents cascade failure while maintaining your survival margin above minimum.

user:
